ddt:Target.Name: A_IVI2_V0.2
ddt:Target.Description:
V0.1 December 11, 2019 1st realease NB: Auto-ident will be updated -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- V0.2 March 02, 2020 Config DID added 1. $2000 : 29 parameters 2. $2001 : 46 Parameters 3. $2002-MEX : 542 Parameters 4. $2003 : 37 parameters 5. $2004- HMI : 200 Parameters 6. $2005-CONNECTIVITY : 51 Parameters 7. $2007-RVC : 96 Parameters 8. $2008 Multimedia : 46 Parameters
I/O control added 1. Tuner test 2. Speaker tone test 3. Graphics display 4. Speaker test 5. RVC activation 6. RVC Configuration though I/O DID
Routine control 1. Microphone test 2. Bluetooth RSSI Test
Features not supported by XML due to wrong Byte allocation in spec 1. CNF_MEX_Delay_Accel_Lat 2. CNF_MEX_delay_Stabilization_Speed 3. CNF_MEX_distance_Traffic_Jam 4. CNF_MEX_Distance_Traffic_Jam_out 5. CNF_HMI_ADAS_UPA_Mute 6. CNF_RVC_RearCameraYaw 1. Factory Mode configuration not available in XML 2. Long press 3. Antitheft 4. Self diagnosis test 5. Part authentication test 6. SET UP A-IVI2 TIME test 7. FOTA reset test8.

Item.Text: Bose Personal Space” (extension for external amplifier w/o M-CAN)
No Auto Heating And Ventilation Mode
Driver Auto Heating And Ventilation Seat Available
Front Auto Heating And Ventilation Seats Available
Front And 2 Second Row Auto Heating And Ventilation Seats Available
Front And 3 Second Row Auto Heating And Ventilation Seats Available
Front, 2 Second Row And 2 Third Row Auto Heatingandventilation Seats Available
Front, 3 Second Row And 2 Third Row Auto Heatingandventilation Seats Available
No Time Zone Displayed (So Use Default Value Based On Country)
No Heated windscreen to be display
Driving Eco Sailing Savings Not Present
Driving Eco Stopand Start Savings Not Present
Driving Eco Stopand Start Savings Present
Driving Ecoeco Mode Savings Not Present
Driving Eco Eco Mode Savings Present
Driving Eco Text To Speech Not Present
Driving Eco Text To Speech Present
Driving Eco Calculation Not Impacted By CMI Mode
Driving Eco Calculation Impacted By CMI Mode
Driving Eco Econav Savings Not Present
Driving Eco Ged For Ice Not Present
Driving Eco Ged For Ice Present
Driving Eco Gains Due To Decelerations Not Present
Driving Eco Gain Due To Decelerations Present
Driving Eco Gains Due To To Zero Emission Not Present
Driving Eco Gains Due To To Zero Emission Present
Driving Eco Ev Ratio Not Present
Driving Eco ECO Rank Not Present
Gear Shift Contact Breaker Buzzer Not Present
Gear Shift Contact Breaker Buzzer Present
Do Not Display Energy Flow Between Battery And Acc
Display Energy Flow Between Battery And Acc
Tpw Is Not Present And Tpms Is Not Present
Tpw Is Not Present And Tpms Is Present
Tpw Is Present And Tpms Is Not Present
Rear Wiper When Rear Gear Engaged Not Present
Rear Wiper When Rear Gear Engaged Present

Data.Name: Number of CD inserted in radio
VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
Gain in distance due to use of ecom mode
Gain in distance due to use of ecom mode
Without smart charging and Without Charge Programming
Without smart charging and With Charge Programming
With smart charging and Without Charge Programming
display torque split and clinometer HMI
Hmi Setting Allowed At Engine Running
Normal plus Accelerated plus Fast plus DC
Normal plus Accelerated plus Fast plus DC plus Unknown
(Ascending order, Nearest charging station to Farthest charging station)
(Descending order, Farthest charging station to Nearest charging station)
Rest of the world: Group 1 plus Group 2 plus Group 4
France specific: Group 1 plus Group 2 plus Group 3 plus Group 4
China specific AC plus China specific DC
Combo2 plus Type 1 plus Combo 1 plus Unknown
No Air Freshener To Be Display
Heated Steering Wheel is not present
With Driver And Passenger Electromechanical Massage
With Driver And Passenger Pneumatic Massage
With 3 seats row2 and 2 seats row 3
Without Settings Temperature In Preconditionning Programming
Auto Follow Me Home Not Present
Mirrors Folding At Door Lock Not Present
Mirrors Folding At Door Lock Present
Front and 2 Second Row Heated Seats Available
Front and 3 Second Row Heated Seats Available
Front, 2 Second Row and 2 third Row Heated Seats Available
Front, 3 Second Row and 2 third Row Heated Seats Available
Driver Heated and Ventilated Seat Available
Front Heated and Ventilated Seats Available
Front and 2 Second Row Heated and Ventilated Seats Available
Front and 3 Second Row Heated and Ventilated Seats Available
Front, 2 Second Row and 2 third Row Heated and Ventilated Seats Available
Front, 3 Second Row and 2 third Row Heated and Ventilated Seats Available

Data.Name: Routinestatus
Data.Comment: Read the status of the routine

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: Testing output : List of all output with permanent test

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Number of CD inserted in radio

DataItem.Name: Number of CD inserted in radio

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Test.Description: V-CAN Bus Off condition/V-CAN Mute condition/BCM Absent condition/X Absent condition
M-CAN Bus Off Condition/M-CAN Connection error Condition/M-CAN Mute Detection

Label.Text: Read and Write Buttons for HMI are available in screen "HMI-Part1"
Read and Write Buttons for HMI are available in screen "HMI-Part1"
Read and Write Buttons for HMI are available in screen "HMI-Part1"
Read and Write Buttons for HMI are available in screen "HMI-Part1"
- force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Label.Text: This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
When requested by diag tool, Bluetooth RSSI & Link quality should be returned. Conditions: Mobile phone must be connected.

When a sound is requested, ECU must: 1. Mute all sources. 2. Issue the requested sound. 3. Activate microphon.4. Return to normal state. services will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine displays a permanent black screen:
This routine displays a permanent white screen:
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine is used to check rear view camera functionality.
This routine displays rear view picture.
This routine is used to calibrate rear view camera guidelines settings.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.

This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0, before activating this service please make sure that RVC camera is configured as fitted
By using this request, ECU should be able to set a tuner to the requested frequency
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
